instruction: Write a follow-up email to a diamond buyer who has not responded in 14 days regarding a 3ct VS1 emerald cut diamond.
response:
Dear [Name],

I hope you are doing well.

I wanted to follow up on the 3ct VS1 Emerald Cut diamond we shared with you earlier. Given the current demand in this category, we are seeing strong movement in similar stones.

Please let me know if you would like us to hold this piece or share additional options matching your requirements.

Looking forward to your response.

Warm regards,
Diamond Industries

instruction: Write a cold outreach email to a US-based jewelry retailer introducing our certified diamond inventory.
response:
Dear [Name],

Greetings from Diamond Industries.

We are a global supplier of certified diamonds, offering a wide range of GIA and IGI stones across various shapes and sizes. Our inventory is carefully curated to meet the needs of modern retailers.

We would be happy to share our latest stocklist and pricing with you.

Please let us know a convenient time to connect.

Best regards,
Diamond Industries

instruction: Write an email confirming order acceptance for a 7ct oval diamond parcel.
response:
Dear [Name],

Thank you for confirming your order for the 7ct Oval Diamond parcel.

We are pleased to proceed and will initiate the documentation and dispatch process as per our agreed terms. The invoice and shipping details will be shared shortly.

We appreciate your trust in us and look forward to completing this transaction smoothly.

Kind regards,
Diamond Industries

instruction: Write a reminder email for an overdue payment of a radiant cut diamond shipment.
response:
Dear [Name],

I hope you are doing well.

This is a gentle reminder regarding the pending payment for the Radiant Cut diamond shipment. As per our records, the invoice is now overdue.

We would appreciate it if you could update us on the payment status or expected timeline.

Please feel free to reach out if any clarification is required.

Warm regards,
Diamond Industries

instruction: Write an email offering a discount on bulk purchase of round brilliant diamonds.
response:
Dear [Name],

I hope this message finds you well.

We are currently offering special pricing on bulk purchases of Round Brilliant diamonds. This is a limited-time opportunity designed for our valued partners.

If you are planning any upcoming procurement, we would be happy to provide a customized quotation.

Looking forward to working with you.

Best regards,
Diamond Industries

instruction: Write an email sharing a new inventory list of fancy colored diamonds.

Greetings from Diamond Industries.

Please find the attached stocklist for your review. Let us know if any specific stones match your requirements.

We look forward to your feedback.

Warm regards,
Diamond Industries

instruction: Write a meeting request email to discuss long-term supply partnership.
response:
Dear [Name],

instruction: Write an email to a client informing them that a requested diamond is no longer available and suggesting alternatives.

Kind regards,
Diamond Industries

response:

Thank you for your continued trust and for closing this deal with us.

We truly value our partnership and are committed to delivering consistent quality and service.

We look forward to working with you on future opportunities.

Warm regards,
Diamond Industries
